programs.title: Knee High Spies
programs.desc: Lauchie and Scarlett are making a homemade movie with their toys in the backyard, but Silver Paw is determined to be the superstar.

programs.title: Stan Can
programs.desc: Mayor Myrtle is stuck in her bedroom and needs Stanley to get her out so she can get to the school for Tree Planting Day.

programs.title: Nikhil & Jay
programs.sub_title: Nikhil and Jay and the Anniversary
programs.desc: When Nikhil and Jay try to help Appa and Amma surprise each other for the anniversary of their first date, things quickly get out of hand!

programs.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programs.desc: When the Nature Explorers' new butterfly friend flies away, Gabrielle wonders how they can get it to come visit their garden again.

programs.title: Mittens & Pants
programs.desc: Mittens wants to play pirates in a cardboard box, but every time someone else is in the box playing a different game. Will she ever get to play pirates?

programs.title: BeddyByes
programs.desc: MeMo and BaBa have fun discovering wheels and the joy of motion.
